programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: The bidding begins at the large animal auction, and the Pols bid on taking home sheep and cows to their farm; the Pols finish working on the sheep hut.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: The Pols need to fix the sheep hut before winter arrives.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: The Pols get to work on building a garden; Beth surprises her brother.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Dash across southeast Queensland as breeding and snake-catching season ramp up; Adele and Mick go up against an eastern brown, the second-deadliest snake in the world; Stu and Liv tangle with a carpet python.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Launch into spring's snake surge with Liv and Stu, who intercept two male brown snakes duelling for mating rights at a construction site; stand back as Dan and Jess rescue chickens from a python and Mick and Adele hunt for a rogue green tree snake.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Chase a rogue lizard and a python, and free an eastern brown caught in a fence.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Confronting venom and brutal heat as snakes seek shelter in all the wrong places.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Untangle, extract, and outwit snakes that have been slithering into the suburbs.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Battle browns, red bellies, and pythons invading Aussie farms.

programme.desc: The toothy fish that help sharks maintain their pearly whites; the signature calls of dolphin families; the capuchin monkey's nut-cracking stone tools; snuggling giraffes; a meerkat mobster.

programme.title: Animals, They're Just Like Us!
programme.desc: It takes a village to raise lion cubs in Kenya; sniff out the mating strategy of fragrant lemurs in Madagascar; cutting a rug at a honeybee dance party; a forked-tailed drongo tricks other birds out of their dinner.

programme.title: Animals Like Us
programme.desc: Stealing meals with frigate birds; visiting a warthog spa; cracking an elephant code.

programme.title: Animals Like Us
programme.desc: Boning up on desert eats; flirting with lions; witnessing an elephant babysitters' club.

programme.title: Animals, They're Just Like Us!

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Northern Territories
programme.desc: In search of a steady supply of dog food, Becky and family establish a Fish Camp on Great Slave Lake; Kim and Pierre work on a new shelter; Bentley and new comer Jon Grenier attempt to secure essential sources of meat before winter sets in.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Northern Territories
programme.desc: Becky and Dene make upgrades to their new homestead; Kim and Pierre look to the land for a source of emergency food; Bentley tries his hand at some early season trapping; Jon takes to the sea in his on-going quest to pad his winter larder.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Northern Territories
programme.desc: Becky struggles to secure a steady supply of winter water; Kim and Pierre turn their attention to harvesting big game; Jon looks to the land for some much-needed supplies; Bentley cruises the waters of Schade Lake.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Northern Territories
programme.desc: Kim and Pierre redouble their efforts to harvest a moose; Becky pushes herself to the limit for her dogs; Bentley and his father build a summer runway for their plane; Jon and his two sons look to the past to help them build for their future.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Northern Territories
programme.desc: On the hunt for a steady supply of fish, Bentley and his father, Gary, brave subzero temperatures on a remote, frozen lake; Jon heads into the bush on a mission.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Northern Territories
programme.desc: Kim and Pierre's trapline expansion is well underway when a troublesome local resident threatens to derail their plans; Jon and his wife Lally brave extreme arctic conditions as they attempt to secure a supply of food.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Northern Territories
programme.desc: Jon and his brother Lee search a vast expanse of tundra - on the hunt for a herd of muskox; Kim and Pierre head deep into the bush in an all-out effort to expand their Yukon trapline; Becky heads into the wilderness.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Northern Territories
programme.desc: Desperate to harvest a musk ox, Becky, Dene and Thi head out in to the unforgiving barren lands of the Northwest Territories; Kim and Pierre try to outfox a wolf that threatens their new trap line; Bentley begins preparing a wolf hide for market.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
